category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates Docker hosts locally and on cloud providers; GitLab docs describe Docker Machine creating build hosts on demand.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is docker-machine; GitLab official docs use Docker Machine.
docs_sources: Official GitLab documentation for installing and using the GitLab-maintained Docker Machine fork.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive points to gitlab.com/gitlab-org/ci-cd/docker-machine; official GitLab docs link to this Docker Machine fork.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and GitLab docs identify Docker host provisioning for local and cloud/autoscaled environments.
